name: trace-browser-extension
description: Trace browser extension source and iOS/macOS Safari wrapper

scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:release && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.test: node --test test/collector.test.js test/library-overlay.test.js test/library-overlay-runtime.test.js test/library-overlay-site-hint.test.js test/background-runtime.test.js test/popup.test.js test/sync.test.js
